gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7600 XT (radeonsi, navi33, LLVM 19.1.7, DRM 3.59, 6.8.0-63-generic)
notes: No executable shipped for the "native" version. Boots fine with Proton Experimental and 10 GE, but controller is not recognized in either, with steam input enabled or not, so both the linux and windows versions are unplayable.
title: Aye Leon
